sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50291" key="i)kriopoi/hsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰκριο-ποίησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n50291.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">erection of scaffolding</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">240</biblScope> </bibl> (prob.).</sense> </entryFree>
